last_response_preview:
Yes — your Zed is using that exact theme. Line 5 of your `~/.config/zed/settings.json`:

```json
"dark": "Claude Code Inspired Dark"
```

That matches the theme from `ericbuess/claude-code-inspired-dark`. It's your active dark mode theme right now, with the warm brown background, cream text, and Claude Orange accents.
